name: WordPress Site Tools
description: WordPress tools: REST (wordpress_rest_request), WP-CLI via wp or ddev (wordpress_wp_cli), connection check (wordpress_connection_check), optional media upload (wordpress_media_upload), optional scoped plugin file IO (wordpress_plugin_files under wp-content/plugins/<slug>/). Use with OpenClaw skill wordpress-expert (ClawHub). Env or plugin config for URLs, auth, install path, wpCliRunner.

baseUrl.description: Optional override for WORDPRESS_SITE_URL (no trailing slash).

wordpressPath.description: Optional override for WORDPRESS_PATH: WordPress root for direct wp, or DDEV project root (directory containing .ddev/) when wpCliRunner is ddev.

wpCliRunner.description: How to invoke WP-CLI: wp (default, spawn wp on host) or ddev (spawn ddev wp in wordpressPath). Override with env WORDPRESS_WP_CLI_RUNNER.

wpCliAllowPrefixes.description: If non-empty, replaces default WP-CLI allowlist. Each string is a prefix of tokens after wp, e.g. "post list" or "plugin activate".

wpCliProfile.description: Named WP-CLI allowlist preset when wpCliAllowPrefixes is empty or omitted: builtin-default, extended-read, content-staging, staging-admin, dev-local. See skill references/WPCLI_PRESETS.md.
